title: TowiMod
description: A psychological horror mod with a touch of humor, created especially for the YouTuber Towi.
body:
This mod was made for the popular YouTuber Towi. It blends psychological horror with a touch of humor—hope you enjoy it! (:
Before you start, here are a few things you should know:

Do not use this mod alongside others that modify world generation.
It is not optimized for multiplayer.
Don’t worry — it won’t harm your PC.
The mod is inspired by The Broken Script and other psychological horror mods.

This mod includes:

15 new horror events that may occur randomly during gameplay (These can range from potion effects to entity spawning.)

A new dimension

A new biome where the likelihood of events occurring is increased, featuring new entities and structures

Entities inspired by the content of the YouTuber 'Towi' (For example: Towi himself) or related to anecdotes (For example: A coffee)
 

 

 

I hope Towi likes it ):
